title: Rich Syrian Lamb Kebabs
description: A pungent and gooey Syrian dish featuring lamb and vanilla pod, cooked to perfection on the grill and served in an earthenware bowl.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until cooked to desired doneness.
While the kebabs are cooking, mix the lemon juice and vanilla pod in a small bowl.
Brush the kebabs with the lemon juice mixture during the last minute of cooking.
Serve the kebabs hot in an earthenware bowl, garnished with additional lemon juice and vanilla pod if desired.
